subcodes.first_line: The world hath been deprived of the splendours of the Sun of certitude by vain imaginings, and the delusions of the Shiite faction have been renewed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را اوهام از انوار نیر یقین محروم نموده اوهامات حزب شیعه تجدید شده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
